scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @tradl/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tradl/server
scripts.dev:client: npm run build -w @tradl/shared && npm run dev --workspace @tradl/client
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tradl/shared && npm run build -w @tradl/server && npm run build -w @tradl/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @tradl/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
